{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322015641CC78AD9743F0D03CBC5B"}"},"total":164},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618258099222954776","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情新颖，逻辑也没什么漏洞。人物性格也很讨喜。唯一的缺点就是主人公还不够强，什么时候加强一下变成“圣·凯南。”[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773767841,"group_id":"7608986456685546520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吔！！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5UseNgaXBrCEhkYEzrpgRhBqgTjWznbMNLOiMMIsD8N","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/da9c00ef9f52406c905ce0b54bb6c466~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706084&x-signature=75Nj%2BEJnrnW9tIw2JIIL7eFReYs%3D","user_id":"4136782443067486","user_name":"天武茶道小金鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4136782443067486","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608986456685546520","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+系统+多女主+童话】
李凯南穿越了，好消息是身上有系统，但坏消息是系统的语言是不通的。
【尊敬宿主，攻略系统将为您服务。】
【您穿越到童话世界，本系统将辅助你击败原本作为故事主角的国王和王子，攻略美丽的王后、公主们，让她们彻底臣服于您的魅力之下……】
……
但因为系统语言补丁没打好，导致李凯南看到是这样的内容：
【尊敬宿主，？？系统将为您服务。】
【……穿越……**&%7^^，……击败……）9_=*&6^%54……国王……，攻……µç×ÓË……臣服……】
嗯，懂了！
就是要击败所有国王让他们彻底臣服，这是战争系统！
……
